evals.name: s2-happy-path-spec-covered
evals.prompt: /forge spec add the backpack to cart and verify the badge count is 1
evals.expected_output: Full chain: spec mode executes against sandbox in baseline state (3 baseline snippets, both slots free). Driver invokes existing snippets, spec-writer produces or updates a spec, spec-verifier confirms it passes from cold start. Convergent — sandbox ends with 3 snippets present (regardless of starting count) and a passing spec.
expectations: After the run, forge/snippets/ contains exactly 3 .ts files
One snippet's filename semantically maps to login (contains 'login' or 'auth' or 'sign-in')
One snippet's filename semantically maps to add-to-cart (contains 'add' and either 'cart' or 'item')
One snippet's filename semantically maps to badge / cart count (contains 'badge' or 'count')
After the run, at least one .spec.ts file exists in forge/specs/
The lead's final report indicates the spec-verifier confirmed the spec passes from cold start
Exactly 4 Agent (subagent) calls were made: forge:driver, forge:snippet-author, forge:spec-writer, and forge:spec-verifier
